description: CompositionMustard round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, softly ribbed neckline and graphic print with lettering on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery This mustard tantra tee has been made specially for all you travel freaks for whom vacations are more fun because of the way they reach their destination, rather than the destination itself. Apply the same principle to your life's journey, and see how much sense that makes!  Team this t-shirt with jeans or shorts and explore life.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
